Verify that the operational modes of all equipment and systems accordance with the states listed in the 'Pre-Test Status Before Fault' column of the "00 Normal ST" sheet.
Ensure that the equipment installation is secure.
Check for any loosening of the securing screws.
Verify that the equipment power cable connection is correct.
Verifying the electrical wire connections for tightness and security
Verify the correct connection of the chilled water pipes.
Check for any water leakage at the connections.
Verify the correct connection of the chilled water pipes.
Verify the integrity of the insulation on the chilled water pipes.
Ensure that all PLC panels are operating correctly and verify that the BMS connection is functioning properly.
Connect the onsite workstation to the BMS and verify that all data can be read correctly.
Ensure that the XDU units start up properly.
Set XDU Secondary Side Differential Pressure to 1.2 bar

All measuring instrument must be accompanied by a calibration certificate from a recognized and accredited calibration laboratory. The certificates should be valid for the duration of the commissioning process.
Compare the sensor reading with a reference thermometer in a controlled environment. Place the sensor in a controlled humidity chamber with a known humidity level
Take Screen - Thermal Scanner Handheld temperature and humidity meter BMS Screen
Measure the temperature at the sensor location and compare it with the reference thermometer reading.
Record the margin of error. Temperature : ℃
Compare the sensor reading with the chamber’s humidity setting.
Record the margin of error. Humidity : %
Adjust the sensor output if necessary to match the reference thermometer within the specified accuracy range.

FlowMeter of BTU meter Calibration NT201 (P&ID)
Use a calibrated standard flow source to test the water flow meter, setting the source to a known flow rate (e.g., L/min). Set one P2100 unit to a fixed flow rate.
Take Screen - Handheld water flow meter BMS Screen
FlowMeter of BTU meter Calibration NT201 (P&ID)
Compare the water flow meter reading with the standard flow source setting.
Record the margin of error. Water Flow Rate : LPM
FlowMeter of BTU meter Calibration NT201 (P&ID)
Adjust the water flow meter output if necessary to match the standard source within the specified accuracy range.
Use a calibrated standard flow source to test the water flow meter, setting the source to a known flow rate (e.g., L/min). Set one P2100 unit to a fixed flow rate.
Take Screen - Handheld water flow meter BMS Screen
Compare the water flow meter reading with the standard flow source setting.
Record the margin of error. Water Flow Rate : LPM
Adjust the water flow meter output if necessary to match the standard source within the specified accuracy range.
Record the calibration data and any adjustments made
